Find your solution
Effortless accounting software for organized workflow
Simplify processes, cut out manual tasks, and close the book faster with the #1 accounting software for small businesses, medium enterprises, and freelancers. No matter the size, we offer the best desktop and cloud accounting software tailored to your needs.
Explore our accounting solutions
Features and benefits of cloud accounting
The best business accounting software solutions go beyond number crunching. Our accounting software automates tasks and gives real-time insights, so you can focus on growth.
Automate billing
Customize invoices, streamline payment processing and get paid faster.
Oversee expenses
Effortlessly track expenses and time, minimize human errors and get accurate expense reports.
Tax compliance
Calculate tax deductions, file tax returns timely and stay on top of legislation changes and tax updates.
Control job costs
Track job costs with detailed records, customize job statuses and identify revenue-driven projects.
Order and inventory
Streamline quote-to-cash process, automate stock tracking, and optimize stock levels to hit sales targets.
Online invoicing
Generate and send invoices automatically, add secure online payments, and manage invoices on the go.
Secure your financial data
Keeping accounting data secure is critical. Your business needs to run without the worry of losing or releasing private information. Integrate online accounting software to keep your sensitive data safe. Cloud-based technology gives your business finances top-tier security. Plus, online software has automatic backups, so you never have to worry about losing data.
Boost profitability
Businesses need to improve money management to run better and boost profitability. Cloud accounting software gives you accurate and real-time financial insights.  This allows your business to act quickly, manage costs effectively, and reduce expenses.
Save valuable time
Spending time on tedious accounting tasks wastes valuable time you could invest in growing your business. The best automated accounting software allows you to manage financial processes smoothly from any device. It eliminates manual operations and streamlines your process by minimizing errors and redundant checks.
Explore our desktop and cloud accounting solutions
Whether you’re a freelancer, a small business, or a medium-sized company on the rise, our accounting packages have you covered. They include all the essentials and adapt as your business grows. Upgrade or cancel anytime—no long-term contracts, commitments, or hidden fees.
Sage Intacct
with Ai
The smart cloud accounting and ERP solution to unleash the potential of your business. Learn why industry leaders choose Sage Intacct.
Discover Sage Intacct

Rated #1 in customer satisfaction by G2.

Accounting software testimonials
"If Sage Intacct got taken away from us tomorrow, I'd feel like the business would go back twenty years."
Henry Shaw
Managing Director, L W Cole
After comparing Oracle NetSuite, Microsoft Dynamics GP, Sage Intacct, and Infor, we learned that Sage Intacct was by far the most focused on the fundamentals of accounting and financial reporting. These (time) savings now allow me to reallocate my time to projects closer to 50%. We've also improved team morale because people no longer spend their time on mundane tasks, and enjoy the flexibility of working from anywhere due to cloud based systems.
Bryan Schmidt
Controller, Unite Here Health
7 reasons to move to cloud financials now
White paper
Leverage online accounting for real-time insights and embrace today's business agility. Respond to new challenges faster and make data-driven decisions.
Learn more
Accounting software FAQs
What is accounting software?
Accounting software is a tool designed to help businesses record, manage, and analyze their financial transactions. From tracking income and expenses to generating reports, it streamlines accounting tasks, making life easier for business owners, bookkeepers, and accountants.
Different types of software cater to different needs—small businesses often prefer simple solutions, while larger organizations might use more advanced tools to manage complex financial data across multiple departments.
At Sage, we offer flexible accounting and bookkeeping software to suit businesses of all sizes.
Sage 50 is ideal for small businesses
. It makes it easy to create and track invoices, manage cash flow, accept payments, record transactions, automate admin tasks, capture expenses, and more. With the added flexibility and security of the cloud, you can manage your accounting on the go—anytime, anywhere.
Sage Intacct is perfect for scale-ups and medium-sized businesses
with more complex accounting needs. It offers powerful features to handle growing financial demands with ease.
No matter your business size, Sage has the tools to help you stay on top of your finances and grow with confidence.
What is cloud accounting? What are benefits of working on the cloud?
Cloud accounting means your financial data is stored securely on remote servers and accessed via the internet, rather than being installed on your desktop or managed manually in spreadsheets. Cloud-based accounting software allows you to access your financial information from anywhere, on any device with an internet connection—eliminating the need for on-site servers or complicated IT setups.
Working on the cloud offers several benefits:
Access your data anytime, anywhere:
Manage your finances wherever you are, using any device connected to the internet.
Real-time collaboration:
Collaborate easily with your bookkeeper, accountant, or team, ensuring everyone has access to the most up-to-date financial information.
Automatic updates and secure backups:
Your data is stored on secure servers with automatic backups, so you don’t have to worry about losing information or keeping your software updated manually.
Streamlined efficiency:
With everything in one place, you can reduce time spent on admin and focus on running your business.
How easy it is to grow from desktop accounting system to cloud accounting software?
Transitioning from a desktop accounting system to cloud-based accounting software is a straightforward process that offers numerous benefits for growing businesses.
For businesses currently using Sage 50, a desktop-based system, upgrading to Sage Intacct—a comprehensive cloud-based accounting solution—can be particularly advantageous. Sage Intacct is designed to grow with your business, offering advanced features such as multi-entity management, customizable reporting, and seamless integration with other business applications. The migration process is streamlined to ensure minimal disruption, allowing you to quickly leverage the benefits of cloud accounting.
By making the switch, you can access your financial data from anywhere, facilitate better team collaboration, and gain deeper insights into your business's financial health, all while maintaining the reliability and support you've come to expect from Sage.
Wisdom for smarter business

Sage Advice
Explore our blog and find articles, insights, and tips to support your business.
How to keep track of business expenses
Learn how to keep track of business expenses, from setting up a dedicated account and choosing the right tools to building consistent review habits.
Read more
Read more
How to reduce supply chain costs: 10 strategies that work
Reducing supply chain costs starts with knowing where money is going. Discover 10 proven strategies to cut expenses and protect your margins.
Read more
Read more
Expense fraud: How to detect and prevent it in your organization
Expense fraud can quietly erode your bottom line. Explore common examples, how to spot the warning signs, and strategies to prevent reimbursement fraud.
Read more
Read more
What is a purchase order (PO) and how is it used?
Learn what a purchase order is, how it works in the procure-to-pay process, what it should include, and the main types your business needs to know.
Read more
Read more
What is order management?
What is order management and how can you use this process to optimize your workflow and boost customer satisfaction? Learn more from the experts at Sage.
Read more
Read more
Supply chain KPIs: The 10 metrics that matter most for your business
Supply chain KPIs are metrics that show how well your operations are running. Learn the 10 most important ones and how to start tracking them.
Read more
Read more
What is the Order to Cash process?
Order to cash (O2C) is the end-to-end process from customer order to payment received. Learn the key steps, KPIs, and how to optimize your O2C cycle.
Read more
Read more
What is an order management system?
Discover how an order management system streamlines your order life cycle, improves supply chain visibility, and strengthens operational oversight.
Read more
Read more

We use cookies, server logs and other technologies to make our website work, see how it is used and help provide tailored online content and experience.
When you consent to tracking cookies and similar technologies, collected data may be used to profile you. For more information, please see our
Cookie Policy
and
Privacy Policy
.
Please click “Accept all cookies” to continue to enjoy our website with all cookies and similar technologies or click “Cookie settings” to manage your cookie preferences.
Cookies settings
Accept all cookies
Privacy Preference Center
Privacy Preference Center
Your Privacy
Strictly Necessary Technologies
Performance Technologies
Functional Technologies
Targeting Technologies
Your Privacy
We use strictly necessary cookies to make our website work. We’d also like to set additional cookies and other technologies (including server logs) to help us improve it. By clicking ‘Allow All’, you agree to the storing of all optional technologies on your device which we will access and use to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage and performance, improve the functionality of our website, track your activities, offer real-time help if appropriate and assist in our marketing efforts. By clicking “Allow All”, you also allow us to use our server logs for the purposes set out above. Click on each category of technologies on the left for details about the optional tracking. For more detailed information about the tracking technologies we use, see our Cookies.
Cookie Policy
Strictly Necessary Technologies
Always Active
These are cookies and similar technologies that are needed for our website to function properly. For 
example, they allow you to access secure areas of our website or to remember what you have put 
into your shopping basket. You can disable these cookies by changing your browser settings, 
however that may affect how our website functions and could impact your experience.
Cookies Details
Performance Technologies
Performance Technologies
Performance cookies and similar technologies (including server logs) allow us to monitor and analyse 
the use and performance of our website. The data we receive tells us how many people use our 
website; which pages are the most popular and allows us to see how visitors move around our site. 
We use this data to improve our website and gather business insights and statistics for marketing 
purposes. Please see our Privacy Notice for further details.
Cookies Details
Functional Technologies
Functional Technologies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Cookies Details
Targeting Technologies
Targeting Technologies
These cookies and similar technologies are set by us to show you advertisements and other content 
that you may be interested in. They allow us to record your use of our website. We may use the data 
to make suggestions to you about products and services that you may be interested in or to offer real
time help if appropriate. Where you consent to targeting technologies, we collect information about 
your usage of our website from server logs and share this information with third parties using their 
conversion APIs (an API is a software intermediary allowing two applications to talk to each other, 
when using a conversion API, we allow our server to communicate with these third party servers) for 
the purpose of ensuring our advertisements match the potential interest of users, of tracking the 
effectiveness of ads and optimising the effectiveness of our campaigns. You can find more information 
about these purposes in our Privacy Notice, Section 6.e. No third parties advertise on our website. Please see our Privacy Notice for further details.
Cookies Details

analysis.name: Sage
analysis.tagline: Sage high-performance finance software helps finance teams confidently drive growth with AI automation, insights, and connected workflows.
analysis.value_proposition: Cloud-based accounting, ERP, HR, and payroll suite spanning small business to mid-market with finance-grade AI agents.
analysis.ideal_customer: Scaling and midsized finance, HR, and operations teams (30,000+ customers) needing multi-entity accounting, ERP, and automation

features.name: cloud financials
features.description: Cloud-based financial accounting for midsize businesses
features.evidence_quote: Grow and scale your business with cloud financials, operations, HR, payroll, and planning.

features.name: multi-entity accounting
features.description: Manage multiple entities and currencies in one platform
features.evidence_quote: Manage multi-entity, multi-currency accounting and inventory.

features.name: multi-currency accounting
features.description: Support for transactions in multiple currencies

features.name: erp software
features.description: Enterprise-class ERP for manufacturing and distribution
features.evidence_quote: Get enterprise-class ERP software for manufacturing and distribution that's highly customizable.

features.name: retail operations automation
features.description: Cloud retail ops via Brightpearl by Sage
features.evidence_quote: Streamline and automate your retail operations with a flexible, cloud solution.

features.name: payroll software
features.evidence_quote: Automate your financials, operations, and payroll with a budget-friendly solution.

features.name: hr software
features.evidence_quote: Effortlessly manage and engage your workforce wherever they are.

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Flexibly track time and streamline billing (Sage Timeslips)
features.evidence_quote: Flexibly track time and streamline billing.

features.name: financial planning and budgeting
features.description: Budget and plan with Sage Intacct Planning

features.name: inventory planning
features.description: Forecast and buy to boost bottom line
features.evidence_quote: Forecast and buy to boost your bottom line.

features.name: ar automation
features.description: Accounts receivable automation to get paid faster

features.name: fixed asset management
features.description: Control assets and maximize tax savings
features.evidence_quote: Control your assets and maximize tax savings.

features.name: hcm
features.description: HR, payroll, and talent in one platform
features.evidence_quote: Manage HR, payroll, and talent in one platform.

features.name: crm software
features.description: CRM capability listed as a business need

features.name: ai automation
features.description: AI-driven task automation across finance workflows

features.name: finance intelligence agent
features.description: AI agent to ask financial data questions with auditable answers
features.evidence_quote: Ask your financial data questions and get auditable answers without hunting through records.

features.name: close agent
features.description: AI agent tracking close tasks and flagging blockers
features.evidence_quote: Tracks every close task, flags blockers early, and helps teams close faster

features.name: ap agent
features.description: AI agent for AP coding, PO matching, and approvals
features.evidence_quote: Automates coding, PO matching, and approvals so you process invoices 2x faster.

features.name: financial assurance agent
features.description: AI agent catching unusual journal entries as they post
features.evidence_quote: Protects your books by catching unusual journal entries as they post, before errors spread.

features.name: time agent
features.description: AI agent that builds timesheets automatically from work activity
features.evidence_quote: Builds timesheets automatically from work activity, so billing and payroll stay accurate.

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Customize and send invoices; automate billing
features.evidence_quote: Customize invoices, streamline payment processing and get paid faster.

features.name: online invoicing
features.description: Send invoices automatically with secure online payments
features.evidence_quote: Generate and send invoices automatically, add secure online payments, and manage invoices on the go.

features.name: order management
features.evidence_quote: Streamline quote-to-cash process, automate stock tracking

features.name: tax compliance
features.description: Calculate deductions, file returns, track legislation
features.evidence_quote: Calculate tax deductions, file tax returns timely and stay on top of legislation changes

features.name: project costing
features.description: Track job costs and identify revenue-driven projects
features.evidence_quote: Track job costs with detailed records, customize job statuses

features.name: time and expense management
features.description: Track time and expenses with reporting
features.evidence_quote: Effortlessly track expenses and time, minimize human errors

features.name: real-time insights
features.evidence_quote: real-time insights, so you can focus on growth

features.name: automatic backups
features.description: Automatic cloud backups of financial data
features.evidence_quote: online software has automatic backups, so you never have to worry about losing data.

features.name: community hub
features.description: Peer community for Sage users to connect and share insights
features.evidence_quote: A trusted space where Sage users connect, collaborate, and grow.

features.name: sage university
features.description: Live and on-demand training and certifications

features.name: expert human support
features.evidence_quote: Talk to our product specialists to help you get the most out of your software

differentiators: Finance-grade AI (vs generic AI) — 26% of AI productivity gains lost to verification without it
Close up to 90% faster with AI you can trust
Up to 5X payback in as little as 6 months
Trusted by 30,000+ scaling and midsized teams
Multiple product lines spanning SMB to mid-market ERP

praised: "The decision to go with Sage has been incredible." — Scott Krug, Yankees SVP & CFO
Cambio Communities: 133% growth handled without scaling

tiers.headline_inclusions: Cloud financials, operations, HR, payroll, planning for midsize — request pricing

pricing.notes: All Sage products use contact-sales / request-pricing model; no public per-seat or flat-rate pricing exposed on the US pricing page. Pricing page is a product/feature overview, not a tier-price table.
